User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the Ronda Planner application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

includeInSchedule.description: Whether a user with the 'backup' role should be included in automatic schedule generation.

isTeacher.description: Whether the user is a teacher and prefers weekend (Friday/Saturday) shifts.

RondaSchedule.title: RondaSchedule
RondaSchedule.description: Represents a single ronda schedule entry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RondaSchedule entity.

userId.description: Reference to User assigned to this ronda. (Relationship: User 1:N RondaSchedule)

replacementUserId.description: Reference to the User who is replacing the original user for this shift.

replacementUserName.description: Name of the replacing user, stored for easy display.

ScheduleRequest.title: ScheduleRequest
ScheduleRequest.description: Represents a user's request for a schedule change.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ScheduleRequest entity.

userId.description: Reference to User who made the request. (Relationship: User 1:N ScheduleRequest)

rondaScheduleId.description: Reference to RondaSchedule being requested to change. (Relationship: RondaSchedule 1:N ScheduleRequest)

currentScheduleDate.description: The original date of the schedule being changed.

requestedScheduleDate.description: The new date the user is requesting.

reason.description: Reason for the schedule change request.

RondaReplacement.title: RondaReplacement
RondaReplacement.description: Represents a replacement for a scheduled ronda.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RondaReplacement entity.

rondaScheduleId.description: Reference to RondaSchedule being replaced. (Relationship: RondaSchedule 1:N RondaReplacement)

replacingUserId.description: Reference to User who is replacing the original user. (Relationship: User 1:N RondaReplacement)

CoordinatorAssignment.title: CoordinatorAssignment
CoordinatorAssignment.description: Represents the assignment of a user as a coordinator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CoordinatorAssignment entity.

userId.description: Reference to User who is assigned as the coordinator. (Relationship: User 1:N CoordinatorAssignment)

startDate.description: Start date of the coordinator assignment.

endDate.description: End date of the coordinator assignment.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership is enforced.

/users/{userId}/rondaSchedules/{rondaSch.description: Stores ronda schedules for each user. Enables path-based ownership for security.

/users/{userId}/scheduleRequests/{schedu.description: Stores schedule requests made by each user. Enables path-based ownership for security.

/users/{userId}/rondaReplacements/{ronda.description: Stores ronda replacement requests related to a user's schedule. Enables path-based ownership for security.

/coordinatorAssignments/{coordinatorAssi.description: Stores coordinator assignments. Security rules can ensure only admins or the assigned user can modify these.

/roles_admin/{userId}.description: Documents in this collection indicate administrative privileges for a user. Existence of a document indicates the user is an admin.
